citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15pm on 4.29.26.
The inspector contacted the licensee/registrant in person. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in
enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15pm on 4.29.26. 
The inspector contacted the licensee/registrant in person. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for 
inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in 
enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
